question: Mike used his travel card to purchase airfare, lodging, rental car, gasoline, meals, and parking, and used an ATM to obtain a cash withdrawal. Which expenses must Mike split disburse to the travel card vendor when he submits his voucher?
canonical_answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Apc Government Travel Card
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Gtcc 101
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Gtcc Apc
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Gtcc Log In
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Trax Government Travel Card
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including withdrawal.

appears_in.title: Usmc Gtcc
appears_in.answer: All of the listed expenses, including the cash withdrawal.
